sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 135:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 135:1
items.html: When Bina was refined from phase two to phase, one to give the light Hesed to the vessel of Hesed, at that time, it placed there, along with the light of Hesed, the Hey that was born from her coupling, and Hesed gave to Gevura in only illumination before it departed to the vessel of Bina, and Gevura to Tifferet, etc. When she reached her place, to Yesod, he took the Vav in her and gave the Dalet to Malchut. (Item 44, and Inner Light there)
